compiled_state.title: RED test for skill-trace-analyze script
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Create tests/scripts/test-skill-trace-analyze.sh with 8+ failing behavioral tests:
(a) CONTROL_LOSS detection: write synthetic log with SKILL_INVOKE but no SKILL_RESUMED, run analysis script, verify CONTROL_LOSS in JSON output
(b) No false positive: write complete INVOKE/RESUMED pairs, verify no CONTROL_LOSS
(c) H7=confirmed: write log with depth=3 + CONTROL_LOSS, verify H7 classified as confirmed
(d) H7=refuted: write log with depth=1 + CONTROL_LOSS, verify H7 classified as refuted
(e) H7=insufficient-data: write log with no depth field, verify H7 classified as insufficient-data
(f) Empty/nonexistent log: verify graceful exit with empty report
(g) Malformed log lines (including truncated entries): verify skipped without crash
(h) Multiple nested invocations: verify correct pairing across interleaved entries

Each test uses mktemp -d + trap cleanup. Tests invoke the script and assert on stdout JSON.

## TDD Requirement
RED test task. Tests fail because plugins/dso/scripts/skill-trace-analyze.py does not exist yet.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-skill-trace-analyze.sh
- [ ] 8+ test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-skill-trace-analyze.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'
- [ ] All tests fail (RED confirmed)
  Verify: ! bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-skill-trace-analyze.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry with correct source:test pairing
  Verify: grep -q '^plugins/dso/scripts/skill-trace-analyze.py:.*test-skill-trace-analyze.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] .test-index RED marker present
  Verify: grep 'skill-trace-analyze' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q '\['
- [ ] Each test uses mktemp for isolation
  Verify: grep -c 'mktemp' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-skill-trace-analyze.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 8)}'

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ (RED test task — no implementation needed, tests written and confirmed failing)
